title: Debug a Coding Journey Blog Page
description: An accessibility debugging exercise on Camperbot's coding journey blog. Issues were identified and fixed across the page: heading hierarchy, nav landmark, article structure, and a missing mailto link in the footer contact section.
objectives: Identify and fix accessibility issues in existing HTML
Use correct heading hierarchy without skipping levels
Wrap navigation in a nav element for landmark accessibility
Use article elements to mark self-contained blog posts
Add a mailto: link so email addresses are keyboard-accessible

files.name: index.html
